instruction: The full battery icon looks unusually delicate. Restore the standard outline thickness.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/battery-100.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="0.6"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M21 10.5h.375c.621 0 1.125.504 1.125 1.125v2.25c0 .621-.504 1.125-1.125 1.125H21M4.5 10.5H18V15H4.5v-4.5ZM3.75 18h15A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 21 15.75v-6a2.25 2.25 0 0 0-2.25-2.25h-15A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 1.5 9.75v6A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 3.75 18Z"/></g>
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/battery-100.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M21 10.5h.375c.621 0 1.125.504 1.125 1.125v2.25c0 .621-.504 1.125-1.125 1.125H21M4.5 10.5H18V15H4.5v-4.5ZM3.75 18h15A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 21 15.75v-6a2.25 2.25 0 0 0-2.25-2.25h-15A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 1.5 9.75v6A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 3.75 18Z"/></g>
</svg>
